---
title: "Doublet Finder"
author: "EP"
date: "2025-08-28"
output: html_document
---



```{r setup, include = FALSE, fig.path = "custom/path", warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

options (width = 100)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, dev = c("png", "pdf"))
seed <- 1234

```


```{r load libraries}


suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(ggpubr)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(SingleCellExperiment)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(viridis)
  library(muscat)
  library(circlize)
  library(destiny)
  library(scater)
  library(metap)
  library(multtest)
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(msigdbr)
  library(enrichplot)
  library(DOSE)
  library(grid)
  library(gridExtra)
  library(ggupset)
  library(VennDiagram)
  library(NCmisc)
  library(RColorBrewer)
  library(EnhancedVolcano)
  library(textshaping)
  library(wordcloud)
  library(pathview)
  library(workflowr)
  library(here)
  library(purrr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(patchwork)
  library(Matrix)
  library(ggsci)
  library(SeuratWrappers)
  library(monocle3)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scCustomize)
  library(dittoSeq)
  library(gridExtra)
  library(gsubfn)
  library(ggsci)
  library(igraph)
  library(EnhancedVolcano)
  #library(textshaping)
  library(miloR)
})


```



```{r echo = FALSE}
##load merged file: AM vs. Healthy

seuratAM <- readRDS("~/Documents/01 Projects/00 snRNAseq/00 Myocarditis/data/Merged/Myocarditis_AMvsHealthy_merged_layers_filtered_25.05.25.rds")

#table(seuratAM$dataset)
```


```{r, echo = T}
table(seuratAM$orig.ident)
table(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25)
```









```{r}
seuratAM$clusterName <- "clusterName"
Idents(seuratAM) <- seuratAM$clusterName
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "0" )] <- "Fb1"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "1" )] <- "BEC1"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "2" )] <- "PeriFb1"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "3" )] <- "CM1"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "4" )] <- "TRM1"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "5" )] <- "Lymphocytes"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "6" )] <- "inflMph"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "7" )] <- "VSMC1"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "8" )] <- "BEC2"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "9" )] <- "CM3"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "10" )] <- "NC2"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "11" )] <- "NC1"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "12" )] <- "TRM3"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "13" )] <- "Fb2"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "14" )] <- "Int"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "15" )] <- "CM2"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "16" )] <- "Fb3"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "17" )] <- "VSMC2"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "18" )] <- "BEC3"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "19" )] <- "LECs"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "20" )] <- "TRM2"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "21" )] <- "PeriFb2"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "22" )] <- "Adipocytes"
seuratAM$clusterName[which(seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25 %in% "23" )] <- "Mast cells"

## BEC3 high ICAM1, in NC2 high neurosynaptic monoaminergic activation

colclusterName <- c("#f4a582", "#D53E4F", "#e34a33", "#FEE08B","#feb24c", "#fff7bc","#e5f5e0","#3288BD", "#1c9099", "#253494", "#a8ddb5", "#01665e", "#66C2A5","#c7eae5", "#67001f", "#355C7D","#54278f", "#ece2f0", "#fa9fb5","#a6bddb", "#BEAED4","#B45B5C","#fde0dd", "#dd1c77")

#"#BEAED4"                   
names(colclusterName) <- c("CM1", "CM2", "CM3", "Fb1","Fb2","Fb3", "Int", "PeriFb1", "PeriFb2", "VSMC1", "VSMC2","BEC1","BEC2", "BEC3", "LECs", "NC1", "NC2", "Adipocytes", "Mast cells", "TRM1", "TRM2", "TRM3", "inflMph","Lymphocytes")

colpat_sub<- c("#dfc27d","#BE3144","#355C7D", "#779d8d")

seuratAM$clusterName <- factor(seuratAM$clusterName, levels=c("CM1", "CM2", "CM3", "Fb1","Fb2","Fb3", "Int", "PeriFb1", "PeriFb2", "VSMC1", "VSMC2","BEC1","BEC2", "BEC3", "LECs", "NC1", "NC2", "Adipocytes", "Mast cells", "TRM1", "TRM2", "TRM3", "inflMph","Lymphocytes"))

Idents(seuratAM) <- seuratAM$RNA_snn_res.0.25
DimPlot(seuratAM, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE)

Idents(seuratAM) <- seuratAM$clusterName
DimPlot(seuratAM, reduction = "umap",label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = colclusterName, raster = T)
#pdf("umap_clusters_no_label_AM.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)  
#DimPlot(
 # seuratAM, 
  #reduction = "umap", 
  #label = FALSE, 
  #repel = TRUE, 
  #cols = colclusterName,  
  #raster = TRUE)
#dev.off()



Idents(seuratAM) <- seuratAM$clusterName
DimPlot(seuratAM, reduction = "umap",label = F, cols = colclusterName, raster = T)
```



```{r}

#remove.packages("DoubletFinder")


#devtools::install_github('chris-mcginnis-ucsf/DoubletFinder')



library(DoubletFinder)

exists("paramSweep")  


```


```{r}
## BCmvn (mean-variance normalized bimodality coefficient).


## estimated doublet rate 10-15%
# sct = SC Transform, not used here
# pK: used to calculate each cell's doublet probability, controls size of neighbourhood

rate <- 0.1                 
pcs  <- 1:20                 
use_sct <- FALSE 
n_cells <- ncol(seuratM)
nExp_raw <- round(rate * n_cells)
message("nExp (raw) = ", nExp_raw)
# nExp (raw) = 10827

#nExp <- round(0.13 * 83283)  
#print(nExp)
#sweep.res <- paramSweep(seuratAM, PCs = 1:20, sct = FALSE)
#sweep.stats <- summarizeSweep(sweep.res, GT = FALSE)
#best.pk <- find.pK(sweep.stats)$pK[which.max(find.pK(sweep.stats)$BCmetric)]
#print(best.pk)


sweep.res   <- paramSweep(seuratM, PCs = pcs, sct = use_sct)
sweep.stats <- summarizeSweep(sweep.res, GT = FALSE)
bcmvn       <- find.pK(sweep.stats)  
head(bcmvn)




```


```{r}
bcmvn$pK_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(bcmvn$pK)))
best.idx     <- which.max(bcmvn$BCmetric)
best.pK      <- bcmvn$pK_num[best.idx]
message("Best pK = ", best.pK)


best.pK
# 0.005

## Bimodality Coefficient (BC): statistical measure of how strongly a distribution deviates from unimodality.
## mean BC average BC across all principal components tested for a given pK. High MeanBC means that, on average, the PCs are showing bimodality (better separation).

## A low VarBC suggests that most PCs agree on the signal (consistent bimodality).A high VarBC means only a few PCs are driving the signal (less stable).

ggplot(bcmvn, aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(pK)), y = BCmetric)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  xlab("pK") +
  ylab("BCmvn") +
  theme_minimal()


bcmvn$pK_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(bcmvn$pK)))

if (requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(ggplot2)
  ggplot(bcmvn, aes(x = pK_num, y = BCmetric)) +
    geom_line() + geom_point() +
    xlab("pK") + ylab("BCmvn") + ggtitle("DoubletFinder pK sweep")
}
#str(bcmvn)


```

## 
```{r}

clust <- if ("clusterName" %in% colnames(seuratM@meta.data)) {
  as.factor(seuratM$clusterName)
} else {
  as.factor(Seurat::Idents(seuratM))   
}

homotypic.prop <- modelHomotypic(clust)
nExp_raw <- round(0.1 * ncol(seuratM))
nExp_adj <- round(nExp_raw * (1 - homotypic.prop))

nExp_adj

#3673

md <- seuratM@meta.data
seuratM@meta.data <- md[, !grepl("^(pANN|DF\\.classifications)($|_)", colnames(md)), drop = FALSE]


```

```{r}
seuratM_noDoublets <- doubletFinder(
  seuratM,
  PCs        = pcs,
  pN         = 0.25,
  pK         = best.pK,
  nExp       = nExp_adj,
  sct        = FALSE)


```




```{r}

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(DoubletFinder)
})

rate    <- 0.1                  # expected doublet rate
pcs     <- as.integer(1:15)      # fewer PCs to save memory
pN      <- 0.15                  # fewer simulated doublets than default
use_sct <- FALSE
set.seed(1234)


keep_assay <- DefaultAssay(seuratM)
seuratM <- DietSeurat(
  seuratM,
  assays    = keep_assay,
  dimreducs = intersect(c("pca","umap","tsne"), names(seuratM@reductions)),
  graphs    = NULL,
  counts    = TRUE,
  data      = TRUE,
  scale.data= FALSE
)
gc()

md <- seuratM@meta.data
keep <- !grepl("^(pANN|DF\\.classifications)($|_)", colnames(md))
seuratM@meta.data <- md[, keep, drop = FALSE]


sweep.res   <- paramSweep(seuratM, PCs = pcs, sct = use_sct)
sweep.stats <- summarizeSweep(sweep.res, GT = FALSE)

bcmvn <- find.pK(sweep.stats)
if (!"BCmetric" %in% names(bcmvn) && "BCmvn" %in% names(bcmvn)) {
  names(bcmvn)[names(bcmvn) == "BCmvn"] <- "BCmetric"
}
bcmvn$pK_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(bcmvn$pK)))
best.pK <- bcmvn$pK_num[ which.max(bcmvn$BCmetric) ]
message("Best pK = ", best.pK)

## expected doublets
n_cells  <- ncol(seuratM)
nExp_raw <- round(rate * n_cells)
message("nExp_raw = ", nExp_raw)

## use clusterName column here
if (!"clusterName" %in% colnames(seuratM@meta.data)) {
  stop("clusterName column not found in seuratM@meta.data")
}
clust <- as.factor(seuratM$clusterName)

homotypic.prop <- modelHomotypic(clust)
nExp_adj <- round(nExp_raw * (1 - homotypic.prop))
message("Homotypic proportion = ", signif(homotypic.prop, 4),
        "; nExp_adj = ", nExp_adj)

gc()

# Pass 1: create one pANN
seuratM <- doubletFinder(
  seuratM,
  PCs = pcs,
  pN  = pN,
  pK  = best.pK,
  nExp = nExp_raw,
  sct  = use_sct
)
gc()

# Confirm exactly one pANN
pann_cols <- grep("^pANN", colnames(seuratM@meta.data), value = TRUE)
if (length(pann_cols) != 1L) {
  stop("Expected exactly 1 pANN column after pass 1; found ", length(pann_cols))
}

# Pass 2: reuse that pANN with adjusted nExp
seuratM <- doubletFinder(
  seuratM,
  PCs        = pcs,
  pN         = pN,
  pK         = best.pK,
  nExp       = nExp_adj,
  reuse.pANN = pann_cols,
  sct        = use_sct
)
gc()

## Results
df.cols <- grep("^DF\\.classifications", colnames(seuratM@meta.data), value = TRUE)
final_col <- tail(df.cols, 1)
message("Final DF column: ", final_col)
print(table(seuratM@meta.data[[final_col]]))

```
```{r}
# Locate the most recent DF.classifications* column
df_col <- tail(grep("^DF\\.classifications", colnames(seuratM@meta.data), value = TRUE), 1)
stopifnot(length(df_col) == 1)
table(seuratM@meta.data[[df_col]])

DimPlot(seuratM, reduction = "umap", group.by = df_col) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Doublets on UMAP")





```

```{r}
## 1) Identify the latest DF classification column
#df_col <- tail(grep("^DF\\.classifications", colnames(seuratAM@meta.data), value = TRUE), 1)
#stopifnot(length(df_col) == 1)

## 2) Create a new object with only singlets
#seuratAM_singlets <- subset(seuratAM, subset = .data[[df_col]] == "Singlet")

## 3) Confirm counts
#table(seuratAM@meta.data[[df_col]])
#table(seuratAM_singlets@meta.data[[df_col]])

#message("Removed ", ncol(seuratAM) - ncol(seuratAM_singlets), " doublets; ",
       # ncol(seuratAM_singlets), " cells remain.")

#seuratAM_singlets <- subset(seuratAM, subset = .data[[df_col]] == "Singlet")


```

```{r}
df_col <- tail(grep("^DF\\.classifications", colnames(seuratM@meta.data), value = TRUE), 1)
stopifnot(length(df_col) == 1)

# Make a clean identity from the DF column
seuratM$DF_class <- seuratM@meta.data[[df_col]]
Seurat::Idents(seuratM) <- "DF_class"

# Subset singlets by identity
seuratM_singlets <- subset(seuratM, idents = "Singlet")

# Check
table(seuratM_singlets$DF_class)

```
```{r}
DimPlot(seuratAM, reduction = "umap",label = T, cols = colclusterName, raster = T, repel = T)

Idents(seuratAM_singlets) <- seuratAM_singlets$clusterName
DimPlot(seuratAM_singlets, reduction = "umap",label = T, cols = colclusterName, raster = T, repel = T)
DimPlot(seuratAM_singlets, reduction = "umap",label = F, cols = colclusterName, raster = T, repel = T)

df_col <- tail(grep("^DF\\.classifications", colnames(seuratAM@meta.data), value = TRUE), 1)
stopifnot(length(df_col) == 1)

# Show counts of Singlets vs. Doublets per cluster
tab <- table(seuratAM@meta.data[[df_col]], seuratAM@meta.data$clusterName)
tab

prop_tab <- prop.table(tab, margin = 2) * 100
round(prop_tab, 1)



df_plot <- seuratAM@meta.data
df_plot$DF_call <- df_plot[[df_col]]

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = clusterName, fill = DF_call)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  ylab("Fraction of cells") +
  xlab("clusterName") +
  ggtitle("Doublet fraction per cluster (DoubletFinder)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))



seuratAM <- seuratAM_singlets

```

```{r}

seuratAM <- subset(seuratAM, subset = !clusterName %in% c("Int", "Fb3", "VSMC2", "Adipocytes", "TRM3"))

DimPlot(seuratAM, reduction = "umap", group.by = "clusterName", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = colclusterName)

DimPlot(seuratAM, reduction = "umap", group.by = "clusterName", label = FALSE, repel = TRUE, cols = colclusterName)

table(seuratAM$clusterName)


Idents(seuratAM) <- seuratAM$clusterName
DimPlot(seuratAM, reduction = "umap",label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = colclusterName, raster = T)
#pdf("umap_clusters_label_AM_no doublet.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)  
#DimPlot(
 # seuratAM, 
  #reduction = "umap", 
  #label = TRUE, 
  #repel = TRUE, 
  #cols = colclusterName,  
  #raster = TRUE)
#dev.off()

```
```{r}


#saveRDS(seuratAM, file="~/Documents/01 Projects/00 snRNAseq/00 Myocarditis/data/Merged/seuratAM_noDoublets_annotated_28.08.2025.rds")

```
